svg.title: Touch Traversal system architecture
svg.desc: Fictional Markdown notes pass through a deterministic offline Python pipeline into four static JSON artifacts. The Next.js application validates the bundle, constructs a Graphology model, and renders it with React Three Fiber and WebGL. Mouse, keyboard, and optional local hand input drive the scene without an application backend.
